style_packs.name: Auto
style_packs.description: Leaves stylistic decisions to the system. The model infers the most coherent visual language based on intent, camera, lens, film texture, and color science without forcing a predefined stylistic bias.
style_packs.use_case: General purpose, early exploration, balanced outputs

style_packs.name: Premium restraint
style_packs.description: Understated luxury with disciplined visual control. Avoids excess styling, prioritizing material quality, silhouette clarity, and quiet confidence.
style_packs.use_case: Luxury fashion, Prada-style campaigns, high-end consideration visuals

style_packs.name: Editorial precision
style_packs.description: High-end fashion editorial language focused on sharpness, proportion, and intentional framing. Every element feels deliberate and composed.

style_packs.name: Cinematic realism
style_packs.description: Narrative-driven realism inspired by contemporary cinema. Emphasizes natural light behavior, spatial depth, and emotional presence without theatrical exaggeration.
style_packs.use_case: Narrative fashion films, lifestyle campaigns, story-based ads

style_packs.name: Cinematic memory
style_packs.description: Evokes memory, nostalgia, and emotional residue. Soft contrast, organic imperfections, and film-like behavior suggest lived moments rather than staged scenes.
style_packs.use_case: Heritage brands, emotional storytelling, archive-inspired visuals

style_packs.name: Campaign hero
style_packs.description: Bold, iconic imagery designed to anchor a campaign. Strong subject presence, clear hierarchy, and immediate visual impact.
style_packs.use_case: Main campaign visuals, billboards, brand hero shots

style_packs.name: Product truth
style_packs.description: Objective, honest visual language focused on fit, material behavior, and real-world usability. Style serves clarity, not spectacle.
style_packs.use_case: Fit proof, material proof, consideration-stage visuals

style_packs.name: Clean commercial
style_packs.description: Modern commercial clarity with polished execution. Balanced lighting, clean compositions, and accessible aesthetics.

style_packs.name: Street authentic
style_packs.description: Documentary-inspired street language. Imperfect framing, real environments, and candid energy dominate over polish.
style_packs.use_case: Street style, youth culture, urban fashion narratives

style_packs.name: Archive fashion
style_packs.description: References historical fashion imagery and photographic archives. Emphasizes timeless composition, analog feeling, and cultural continuity.
style_packs.use_case: Heritage storytelling, re-editions, brand legacy projects

style_packs.name: Experimental authorial
style_packs.description: Strong directorial presence. Style is expressive and subjective, prioritizing visual language over conventional readability.
style_packs.use_case: Art projects, limited editions, conceptual campaigns
